svg.title: FinSight AI — Query Pipeline
svg.desc: 21-step query pipeline from voice/text input through hybrid retrieval, 4-level refusal gating, PAL reasoning, GLEAN verification, citation engine, and generative UI output
svg.text: Per user message · streaming SSE response

g.text: Voice → Whisper STT · or text · language auto-detected
Score(d) = Σ 1/(60 + r(d)) · merged ranked list
Calibrated threshold check → refusal if low
GPT-4o / Claude Sonnet · per-sentence chunk citations

svg.text: Prompt caching saves ~80% token cost per session
